message:
feat: add vendored module and update core library

- wa-core/src/lib.rs: Updated library exports and configuration
- wa-core/src/vendored.rs: New vendored utilities module for
  self-contained dependency management

Co-Authored-By: Claude <noreply@anthropic.com>
